---

- [ ] US1 — Add separated evaluation scoring with blinding support: store evaluation records separately from runs and support condition-blind presentation.
- [ ] US2 — Add `graph lab report` with paired comparisons and uncertainty: aggregate runs into scientific-style reports with effect sizes, uncertainty intervals, and null-result support.
- [ ] US3 — Dogfood the experiment lab on this repo's delegated-workflow tasks: exercise the full lab lifecycle on real repo tasks and generate actionable evidence.

Full stories: `docs/themes/TH4-experimental-evidence-lab/epics/E3-evaluation-reporting-and-dogfooding/stories/`
